sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35384" key="e)nenhkontapla/sios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνενηκοντᾰ-πλάσιος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[πλᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n35384.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ninety times as large,</tr_> c. gen., <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1383.tlg001:6:38" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Gem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.38</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
